description:
Create a computerized Corsi Block-Tapping Task for spatial working memory assessment using PsychoPy's Coder interface.

Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/corsi_sequences.csv with columns for span_level, trial_num, and sequence. This file must contain 16 trials (two per span level from 2 to 9), with sequences represented as hyphen-separated block indices (1-9) matching the span level.

Develop the experiment script at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/corsi_task.py. The script must implement an asymmetric layout of nine blocks, present sequences from the conditions file, and validate sequential mouse-click responses. Results for each trial must be saved to the data/ directory. The experiment should include logic to terminate if both trials at a specific span level are failed. The final script must be syntactically correct and utilize appropriate PsychoPy modules for display, timing, input, and data management.
